zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wingfield於1428年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可奧福德時，她的父親Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington26歲，母親Elizabeth Goushill24歲。她與Sir William Brandon在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年4月28日在英國艾可素斯 奧肯登享年69歲，埋葬在英國肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wingfield于1428年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可奧福德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington26岁，母亲Elizabeth Goushill24岁。她与Sir William Brandon在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1497年4月28日在英国艾可素斯 奧肯登享年69岁，埋葬在英国肯特聖 瑪麗 可雷。

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wingfield was born in 1428, in Orford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Goushill, was 24. She married Sir William Brandon in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 28 April 1497, in South Ockendon, Essex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in St Mary Cray, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wingfield est née en 1428, à Orford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Goushill, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Brandon à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 avril 1497, à South Ockendon, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary Cray, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Bishops Lynn, Norfolk, England: King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wingfield 1428 in Orford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Goushill 24. Sie hat in England Sir William Brandon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. April 1497 im Alter von 69 Jahren in South Ockendon, Essex, England und wurde in St Mary Cray, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wingfield è nata il nel 1428 nel Orford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Goushill, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Brandon nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 28 aprile 1497, nel South Ockendon, Essex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a St Mary Cray, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wingfieldが1428年にイギリスイギリススフォルクオルフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Wingfield of Letheringtonは26歳，母Elizabeth Goushillは24歳であった。イギリスでSir William Brandonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年4月28日にイギリスエセックスソウス オクエンドンで69歳で死去し，イギリスケントスト マリー クレイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wingfield(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Goushill(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 영국에서 Sir William Brandon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 4월 28일 영국 에세스 소우스 옥켄던에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 스트 메리 크라이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wingfield nasceu em 1428, em Orford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Goushill, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Brandon em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de abril de 1497, em South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary Cray, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wingfield родилась в 1428 г. в местности орфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Wingfield of Letherington было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goushill, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Brandon в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 28 апреля 1497 г. в местности соут оккендон, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри креи, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Sir William Brandon en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 28 de abril de 1497, en South Ockendon, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary Cray, Kent, Inglaterra.
